response.justification: Szabo brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and systems programming experience, but his C++ knowledge is 18 years old and his recent 15+ years have been in JavaScript/TypeScript web development. While his technical foundation is solid—including systems-level work with D on high-performance, low-latency systems—the primary requirement for modern C++ or Rust development isn't clearly demonstrated. He could succeed with a ramp-up period, but this introduces risk for a critical mid-senior individual contributor role.
strengths: Direct geospatial domain expertise through 9+ years developing GISCollective and Green Map applications
Systems programming foundation through D language work on high-performance, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second
Strong testing and quality-assurance mindset demonstrated across career through TDD practices and infrastructure expertise
concerns: C++ experience is 18 years old (2007–2008, 3 months of work); no modern C++ or Rust demonstrated in recent years
Career trajectory over last 15+ years has moved away from systems programming toward JavaScript/TypeScript web applications and high-level product work
No demonstrated experience building production routing/navigation systems or operationally managing critical data pipelines at scale

key_factors.factor: Missing modern C++ or Rust (primary skill requirement)
Strong geospatial domain knowledge and GIS platform experience
Recent focus on web/application development vs. systems-level work
